title: AN ACT CHANGING THE NAME OF CAMP JAMES ORD IN SAN MIGUEL, TARLAC, TARLAC, TO CAMP GENERAL SERVILLANO AQUINO.

chunks.text:
H. No. 160 / 58 OG No. 46, 7499 (November 12, 1962)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 3494, June 16, 1962 ]

AN ACT CHANGING THE NAME OF CAMP JAMES ORD IN SAN MIGUEL, TARLAC, TARLAC, TO CAMP GENERAL SERVILLANO AQUINO.

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. Camp James Ord in San Miguel, Tarlac, Tarlac, shall henceforth be known as Camp General Seryillano Aquino.

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Approved, June 16, 1962.
